Title: Nosferatu
Writer: Robert Eggers, Henrik Galeen, Bram Stoker
Actors: Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult, Bill Skarsgård
Plot: A gothic tale of obsession between a haunted young woman and the terrifying vampire infatuated with her, causing untold horror in its wake.
Language: English, Romanian, Romany, Russian, Latin, German
Awards: Nominated for 4 Oscars. 61 wins & 198 nominations total
